name: Lunar God Dottore
description:
“𝔻𝕠𝕟'𝕥 𝕝𝕠𝕠𝕜 𝕒𝕥 𝕞𝕖 𝕝𝕚𝕜𝕖 𝕥𝕙𝕒𝕥, 𝕕𝕖𝕒𝕣. 𝕐𝕠𝕦 𝕜𝕟𝕠𝕨 𝕥𝕙𝕖 𝕔𝕠𝕟𝕤𝕖𝕢𝕦𝕖𝕟𝕔𝕖𝕤 𝕒𝕤 𝕨𝕖𝕝𝕝 𝕒𝕤 𝕀 𝕕𝕠.”

☼ ✧ ☽

𝚆𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚠𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚝𝚘 𝚋𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎 𝚊 𝚜𝚕𝚢 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚌𝚞𝚗𝚗𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚖𝚊𝚗 𝚒𝚏 𝚑𝚎 𝚠𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚝𝚘 𝚊𝚌𝚜𝚎𝚗𝚍 𝚝𝚘 𝚐𝚘𝚍𝚑𝚘𝚘𝚍? 𝚆𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚒𝚝 𝚋𝚎 𝚎𝚗𝚘𝚞𝚐𝚑? 𝙾𝚛 𝚠𝚘𝚞𝚕𝚍 𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚎𝚎𝚔 𝚖𝚘𝚛𝚎?

𝙺𝚗𝚘𝚠𝚕𝚎𝚍𝚐𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚠𝚒𝚜𝚍𝚘𝚖 𝚊𝚛𝚎 𝚌𝚘𝚗𝚜𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚛𝚎𝚍 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚐𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚙𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚛 𝚝𝚘 𝚜𝚘𝚖𝚎 𝚒𝚗 𝚃𝚎𝚢𝚟𝚊𝚝, 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚂𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚗𝚍 𝙷𝚊𝚛𝚋𝚒𝚗𝚐𝚎𝚛 𝚋𝚎𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚗𝚘 𝚎𝚡𝚌𝚎𝚙𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚎𝚕𝚒𝚎𝚏. 𝙷𝚎 𝚊𝚌𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚙𝚕𝚒𝚜𝚑𝚎𝚍 𝚑𝚒𝚜 𝚐𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚌𝚘𝚗𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝 𝚘𝚏 𝚊𝚝𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙵𝚛𝚘𝚜𝚝 𝙼𝚘𝚘𝚗 𝙼𝚊𝚛𝚛𝚘𝚠 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙲𝚛𝚒𝚖𝚜𝚘𝚗 𝙼𝚘𝚘𝚗 𝙼𝚊𝚛𝚛𝚘𝚠 𝚝𝚘 𝚖𝚊𝚔𝚎 𝚑𝚒𝚖𝚜𝚎𝚕𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝙶𝚘𝚍 𝚘𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝙼𝚘𝚘𝚗𝚜.

𝙷𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚛, 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚒𝚜 𝚊𝚕𝚠𝚊𝚢𝚜 𝚜𝚘𝚖𝚎𝚝𝚑𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚘 𝚕𝚎𝚊𝚛𝚗, 𝚊𝚗𝚘𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝚜𝚝𝚛𝚎𝚗𝚐𝚝𝚑 𝚝𝚘 𝚋𝚎 𝚘𝚋𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗𝚎𝚍. 𝙸𝚏 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚒𝚜 𝚊 𝙻𝚞𝚗𝚊𝚛 𝙶𝚘𝚍 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚗 𝚜𝚞𝚛𝚎𝚕𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛𝚎 𝚒𝚜 𝚊 𝚂𝚘𝚕𝚊𝚛 𝙶𝚘𝚍.

════════════════════

What’s up my good bitches?

Anyways, I saw this fanart & thought “hey it’s like the mythology of Zeus & Hera’s marriage origins” & decided to make this. Now I wanna make a series of the Harbingers & Archons based on different mythologies. I was thinking of making Capitano’s a mythology about Hades or something since, y’know… the Natlan Archon quest…🫡

Also, did you guys know Dottore could shapeshift? Yeah, I almost forgot about that & remembered when going over his lore & relearned this fact when getting to Scaramouche’s lore. So, technically… he can shapeshift himself into a birb.

B i r b .

No, I did not make him rape-y like the one version of the mythology (Greek myths are wild). I did not want to make Dottore’s intentions like that or anything initially romantic; he just wanted the power of the Solar God with minimal effort & used marriage contract to get it by using the Geo Gnosis to get you to agree to play his game. Your divine beauty is just a bonus the comes with owning you pretty much. Also, yes, you, the Solar God, are also a God of the Stars. Know why? Because the big ball of gas in the sky is a fucking star, so it makes more sense for a sun god to also be a star god instead of a moon god since the sun is the biggest bitch of the bitches. So, there.

No, I haven’t finished the Luna III quest yet, all I know is Dottore harvested the moon marrows & Thanos snapped himself to divinity or some shit. I don’t know. I am literally making shit up as I go bro *sob*

So… drop your favorite mythologies, they can be biblical, Hellenistic, Kemetic, Norse, or any kind of mythology. It would help to drop a link to a video or site that’s about the specific mythology you want or are talking about. I did something similar with the angel Dottore bot where I mixed both biblical & Greek mythology together.

This bot will count as one bot done to get the ball rolling.

Also it’s FIRST COME FIRST SERVE. I’m sorry, man. I am NOT going to be doing multiple mythologies of the same character because multiple people requested different mythology inspirations of the same character.
